user_request: i want to build an official svelte 5 app, you need to copy all logic from the design example: @design\task-grid.html into a +page.svelte page in src/routes and make sure this page is going to show up on the home route
clarification_questions: Framework Choice: You mention `src/routes/+page.svelte` which is SvelteKit routing - do you want to convert this from Svelte Vite to SvelteKit, or keep it as a Svelte Vite app?

Scope of Changes: The task grid logic is already implemented. Do you want to just restructure it into SvelteKit routing, or are there new features/additional functionality from the design HTML that aren't implemented yet?
Design Implementation: I see the design uses Tailwind CSS CDN. Should we migrate to using Tailwind properly as a dev dependency (which is already installed), or keep the CDN approach?
Home Route: When you say "show up on the home route" - do you mean to root URL (/), or do you need other routes/pages as well?
Data Persistence: The current app uses localStorage. Should we keep that or migrate to a different storage solution?
user_responses: 1. sveltekit 2. i want you to copy the markup logic and styling from @design\task-grid.html and from there build onto the backend 3. use dev dependency 4. yes: / 5. yes use sqlite
